## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass (`npm run test`) and coverage is held (≥80% patch)
- [ ] `typecheck`, `lint`, and `format:check` are clean
- [ ] Accessibility checked for any UI change (labels, keyboard, `vitest-axe`)
- [ ] New user-facing feature is behind a **Remote Config flag** (or N/A)
- [ ] New UI strings are wrapped in `t()` and translated (**EN + ES**)
- [ ] No direct Sentry/Analytics imports (used `errorTracker`) — or N/A
- [ ] No direct storage SDK imports (used `lib/storage`) — or N/A
- [ ] Commits are **DCO-signed** (`Signed-off-by:` present — `git commit -s`)
